GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Why you need to incorporate Hunter Lab's new facial oil into your skincare routine today", "Everything you need to know.", "Facial oils are fast becoming a core component of the daily skincare routine. Intended to be used to soothe and hydrate dull and tired skin, an oil should be a vital step in your ritual if you're serious about your skin–no matter your skin type. As such, it should come as no surprise that natural skincare powerhouse Hunter Lab has chosen to launch its new Lipid Vitamin Face Oil, just in time for the impending change in seasons. The locally-founded brand–birthed in Melbourne in 2015 and best known for creating cult unisex products with natural formulas that outperform synthetic and chemical-based alternatives–has unveiled a multi-functional oil blend crafted to help improve your skin's condition by adding intense hydration to your skincare routine. "Incorporating an oil in your routine is beneficial for all skin types," explains Hunter Lab's product specialist, Chris Mesh. "Our skin produces natural oil known as sebum as a way to hydrate and protect itself. Some skin types produce more sebum (oily), and some less (dry). But, no matter how much natural oil your skin produces, we can all benefit from using an oil to enhance skin's health, vitality and radiance," he adds. Formulated with a 99.9 per cent natural blend of 19 wonder oils and extracts, Hunter Lab's Lipid Vitamin Face Oil boasts plant extracts that prove rich in important antioxidants, vitamins and minerals. On top of that, its core benefits include brightening, smoothing and hydrating the skin, meaning it's the perfect antidote to rejuvenate dull and tired skin. Fast-absorbing and intended for all skin types this advanced formula is crafted with native Australian Kakadu plum seed and rosehip oils that will work to give you a luminous, youthful complexion, powerful Bladderwrack extract to soften and smooth skin, and wonder oils such as myrrh, macadamia, sweet almond and argan oils to deliver deep hydration and help minimise the appearance of pores, blemishes and scarring. While the facial oil was designed to fit effortlessly into your daily skincare routine, and was made with a touch-dry texture so that it can be applied morning or night all year 'round, it can also be used on the ends of your hair to help fight frizz and give a static-free finish, as a luxurious beard oil, and on your cuticles. The Hunter Lab Lipid Vitamin Face oil is now available at hunterlab.com.au, and across a selection of premium Australian retailers, including Adore Beauty and David Jones department stores."
